name: Jeff Daugherty
bio: Jeff Daugherty serves as the Mayor of Lindale, a growing city in Smith County known as the 'Blackberry Capital of Texas.' The mayor presides over city council meetings and represents the community in regional affairs. Lindale operates under a council-manager form of government.
campaignPromises: Manage growth responsibly as Lindale continues to expand
Support local businesses and economic development
Maintain the small-town character of Lindale
